title.instructions:
Keep titles to a few words, no leading verb. Use Japanese. Use the format `<type-emoji> <type>: <title>`. For type-emoji, use following <type> to <type-emoji> mapping.
- feat: ✨
- fix: ⚠️
- docs: 📝
- style: 💎
- refactor: 🔨
- perf: 🚀
- test: 🚨
- build: 📦
- ci: ⚙️
- chore: 🔧

commitMessage.instructions: Follow Conventional Commits. Use Japanese for <description>.

pullRequest.instructions: Include a Testing section in the body.
